headline: Why Toy Story 5 matters more than most Disney sequels
summary: More than three decades after the original "Toy Story" debuted in 1995, Disney is preparing to release "Toy Story 5" exclusively in theaters on June 19, 2026. The film arrives seven years after "Toy Story 4" and at a pivotal moment for the movie industry, as studios continue searching for ways to ...

headline: Global week ahead: Soccer isn't the only thing that's kicking off
summary: World Cup fever grips football fans worldwide ahead of the opening game on June 11th, but it's not just soccer that's kicking off next week.
